text:
A sequence
$\{ a_n\}$
is defined as follows:
$a_0 = 2$
,
$a_1 = 1$
, and for
$n \ge 2,  a_n = 3 \cdot a_{n - 1} - n \cdot a_{n-2} + 1$
.
What is
$a_3$
?

A sequence is defined by the recurrence relation
$f_n = n \cdot f_{n - 1} - f_{n-3}$
. How many initial values are required so that the sequence is well defined for all
$n \ge 0$
?

A population of mice increases by
$10$
% every year. Define
$g_n$
to be the number of mice after
$n$
years. Select the recurrence relation that describes the sequence
$\{ g_n\}$
.

A nursery grows aloe plants for sale. Every month, the nursery takes a cutting from
each of the aloe plants and plants it in a new pot. Each cutting creates one new aloe plant.
At the end of the month, the nursery sells
$100$
plants to a local landscaper.
Let
$a_n$
be the number of aloe plants 
after
$n$
months. Select the recurrence relation that describes the sequence
$\{ a_n\}$
.

A sequence is defined by the recurrence relation
$d_n = 2 \cdot d_{n-5} + d_{n-4}$
. How many initial values are required so that the sequence is well defined for all
$n \ge 0$
?

A sequence
$\{ a_n\}$
is defined as follows:
$a_0 = 3$
,
$a_1 = 1$
, and for
$n \ge 2,  a_n = a_{n - 1} \cdot a_{n-2} - 2$
.
What is
$a_3$
?

A sequence
$\{ b_n\}$
is defined as follows:
$b_1 = 3$
,
$b_2 = 0$
, and for
$n \ge 3,  b_n = n^2 \cdot b_{n - 1} -  (b_{n-2})^2 - 2$
.
What is
$b_3$
?
